services.name: Azure Front Door
services.description: Routes customer traffic to the healthiest regional storefront deployment

services.name: App Service
services.description: Primary regional e-commerce web application handling browsing, cart, and checkout

services.name: App Service
services.description: Secondary regional e-commerce web application for failover and load distribution

services.name: Azure Event Grid
services.description: Distributes order-created events for asynchronous downstream processing

services.name: Azure Functions
services.description: Processes order events and updates order state asynchronously

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.description: Globally distributed product catalog and order metadata store

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Regional session and cart cache for the primary application deployment

services.name: Azure Cache for Redis
services.description: Regional session and cart cache for the secondary application deployment

services.name: Azure Monitor
services.description: Collects platform and application telemetry from the primary compute path

services.name: Log Analytics
services.description: Stores and enables querying of centralized operational logs and metrics

connections.label: Route customer storefront traffic to primary healthy region
Fail over customer sessions to secondary region during degradation
Read and update active customer session and cart state
Read and update secondary-region session and cart state
Query global product catalog and persist checkout records
Query replicated catalog data and persist regional checkout records
Publish order-created event after successful checkout
Publish failover-region order-created event after successful checkout
Trigger asynchronous order workflow for each new order event
Update order processing state and enrich order with catalog details
Send application performance metrics and request telemetry
Export collected telemetry for centralized analysis and retention

workflow.description: Azure Front Door evaluates health and directs shoppers to the primary regional storefront, with the secondary region available for failover.
The selected regional App Service loads the customer's session and shopping cart from the co-located Redis cache.
The regional storefront retrieves product information from the globally distributed Cosmos DB catalog during browsing and checkout.
After checkout completes, the storefront writes order data and publishes an order-created event to Event Grid.
Event Grid delivers each order event to Azure Functions for asynchronous order processing.
Azure Functions updates order status and related metadata in Cosmos DB as processing advances.
The primary application sends runtime telemetry to Azure Monitor for centralized collection.
Azure Monitor forwards collected logs and metrics into Log Analytics for troubleshooting and operational analysis.

metadata.prompt: A multi-region e-commerce system with Cosmos DB for global product catalog, Azure Front Door for traffic routing, Redis Cache for sessions, and Event Grid for order processing
